mentions.surface: Tironem habeo citius quam verebar
venit etiam Nicias
et Valerium hodie audiebam esse venturum
a Peducaeo utique
I have Tiro back sooner than I had feared
Nicias has come too
I was hearing today that Valerius would arrive
at any rate after Peducaeus'
de Vergilio, ut scribis
epistulam ad Caesarem mitti video tibi placere
About Vergilius, as you write
The letter to Caesar I see meets with your approval for sending
de Caerellia quid tibi placeret Tiro mihi narravit
de Caerellia quid tibi placeret Tiro mihi narravit
solutio est nominis Caerelliani
dum et de Metone et de Faberio sciamus
About Caerellia, Tiro told me what you thought
About Caerellia, Tiro told me what you thought
The settling of the Caerellian debt
until we know how things stand with Meto and with Faberius
